package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCachingCacheMissDoesDuplicateWork() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_caching_cache_miss_does_duplicate_work"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Caching. Flag cache miss paths that allow concurrent duplicate recomputation for the same key."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
